nasb.text: And I, the Lord, will be their God, and My servant David will be prince among them; I the Lord have spoken.

esv.text: And I, the Lord, will be their God, and my servant David shall be prince among them. I am the Lord; I have spoken.

cnv.text: 我耶和華必作牠們的　神，我的僕人大衛要在牠們中間作領袖。我耶和華已經說了。

ccb.text: 我耶和华要做他们的上帝，我的仆人大卫要在他们当中做王，这是耶和华说的。
